uncrawled_public_relevant_links.link_context: Le Mai Lan, PhD Vice Chairwoman, Vingroup JSC President of the University Council, VinUniversity We are looking for people who think different, act different, and make things happen. See more

Tan Yap Peng, Prof. Provost, VinUniversity I came to Vietnam to drive breakthroughs with VinUniversity. I hope that VinUniversity will stand as a testament to the power of global collaboration - not only educating resilient global citizens but also creating scientific and technological solutions that contribute to Vietnam’s sustainable development and beyond. See more

Laurent El Ghaoui, PhD Vice Provost of Research & Innovation, VinUniversity Director, Center for Environmental Intelligence Dean, College of Engineering and Computer Science I am keen on further developing strong ties to institutions worldwide, so our University can become a gateway to a fruitful educational experience abroad for our students. In addition, we will strive to organize research workshops and events here, as well as invite distinguished scholars from around the world. See more

Sunmee Choi, PhD Vice Provost of External Engagement, VinUniversity Professor of Service Operations Management, College of Business and Management My vision is to help redefine the future of higher education - through bold innovation, meaningful collaboration, and a strong ecosystem that connects students, alumni, industry, and global partners. Together, we can create transformative learning experiences that empower the next generation of changemakers. See more
